text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hello there, Flash. Are you reviewing for the test?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, Hayahide. That's right. Well, technically we are.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so done. Math's my mortal enemy. Just looking at all these 1s completely drains my whole life force.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wait! What if we add zeros to them? it might be
more exciting!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so we could, like, stack it up till it's a
hundred million?! Get out! Are we math whizzes or
something? We could be total geniuses!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I was helping Falcon with her studies when
Jordan asked me to tutor her as well. So I'm
currently devising a study schedule.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a lot of work. Well... to say I'm in a
similar situation would be—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up, stupid. And talk like normal, you dummy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah, you called me stupid twice! One plus
one is two, so what happens if I make it to three?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep them from giving us a hard time.
Preventing them from failing ought to be enough,
given the frequency of this happening...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's not a concern. So long as they stick to the
schedule I've assigned them, they're certain to
score above average.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I took some of their training time away, giving us
an extra two hours of study. And if that becomes
a problem, they can always start the day earlier.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me for being blunt, but you think those
two can actually handle that?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I promised that I wouldn't let them fail, and I'm
prepared to do whatever is needed to keep that
promise. Now, if you would excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see... I suppose if anyone's in for a hard time, it's
the two she's helping.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And actually, my tutees appear to be slacking as of late... Perhaps I should try an approach similar to Flash's.
